PropertyTypes.Caption: Attribute config
PropertyTypes.Description: "Auto" works only when the widget is placed in a Data grid column.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Automatic options
PropertyTypes.Description: Show options based on the references or the enumeration values and captions.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Entity
PropertyTypes.Description: Set the entity to enable filtering over association.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Selectable objects
PropertyTypes.Description: The options to show in the Drop-down filter widget.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Search attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Required when Filterable is set to yes

PropertyTypes.Caption: Use lazy load
PropertyTypes.Description: Lazy loading enables faster parent loading, but with personalization enabled, value restoration will be limited.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Default value
PropertyTypes.Description: Empty option caption will be shown by default or if configured default value matches none of the options

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the filter. Associations are not supported.

PropertyTypes.Caption: On change
PropertyTypes.Description: Action to be triggered when the value or filter changes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Input caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the input element.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Empty selection caption
PropertyTypes.Description: This text is shown if no options are selected. For example 'Select color' or 'No options are selected'.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Filter input placeholder
PropertyTypes.Description: This text is shown as placeholder for filterable filters. For example 'Type to search'.
